/* ── 全域 Menubar ── */ .global-menubar{ position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:9999; height:28px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55); backdrop-filter:blur(20px) saturate(180%); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px) saturate(180%); display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between; padding:0 16px; font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.92); letter-spacing:0.02em; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; } .gm-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-weight:600;} .gm-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:11px;opacity:0.85;} .mb-menu{padding:0 6px;border-radius:4px;cursor:default;transition:background 0.15s;font-size:12px;} .mb-menu:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);}
